basis: Local seed identifies a GU legendary creature from Secrets of Strixhaven.
Scryfall card context verifies increment, +1/+1 counter mana, and Fractal token text.
Public Commander/source context exists, but commander-specific strategic evidence is thinner than lot1.

source_limit_notes: Profile relies primarily on oracle-text incentives and local card support.

themes.name: simic_increment_counters_to_mana
themes.notes: Berta converts +1/+1 counters placed on it into mana, rewarding increment and counter bursts.

themes.name: fractal_x_token_engine
themes.notes: The activated ability turns mana into 0/0 Fractal tokens with +1/+1 counters.

themes.name: untap_and_counter_scaling
themes.notes: Untap effects and counter multipliers increase the number of activations and mana events.

themes.name: x_spells_and_large_mana
themes.notes: Extra mana from counters can support scalable spells without becoming the only plan.

counter_engine: Hadana's Climb // Winged Temple of Orazca

examples: token deck with no +1/+1 counter engine
avoid_patterns.reason: Berta needs counters to generate mana and make its activated ability scale.

examples: Freed from the Real style loops as mandatory output
avoid_patterns.reason: Combo relevance is not proven and should remain bracket-gated.
